title: Little endian indexing of packed multidimensional arrays is incorrectly assumed to be big endian

features.name: variable part select ascending on packed array
features.description: Code should include a variable part select using the +: operator on a packed array or struct member with ascending index selection

features.name: variable part select descending on packed array
features.description: Code should include a variable part select using the -: operator on a packed array or struct member with descending index selection

features.name: struct with packed multidimensional array
features.description: Code should include a struct type containing packed multi-dimensional array members that trigger endianness-related indexing issues

features.name: multiple consecutive part selects on same array
features.description: Code should include multiple part select operations using both +: and -: operators on the same packed array to trigger endianness miscomparison
